	mov R7, #01h	;   1
	acall jump_3D48
jump_3CF9:
	acall jump_3D80
	sjmp jump_3D35

	mov DPTR, #dptr_8B2C
	movx A, @DPTR
	cjne A, #04h, jump_3D0A	;   4
	mov R7, #01h	;   1
	acall jump_3D48
	sjmp jump_3D13

jump_3D0A:
	mov DPTR, #dptr_8B2C
	movx A, @DPTR
	cjne A, #05h, jump_3D13	;   5
	acall jump_3D24
jump_3D13:
	mov DPTR, #dptr_8B2C
; overlapping 1 byte(s)

org	3D15h
jump_3D15:
	add A, R5

org	3D16h
	movx A, @DPTR

org	3D17h
	jnz jump_3D1D

org	3D19h
	acall jump_3D61
; overlapping 1 byte(s)

org	3D1Ah
fwd_3D1A_jump_3B80:
	ajmp jump_3B80


org	3D1Ch
	dec @R0
jump_3D1D:
	mov DPTR, #dptr_8B2C
	movx A, @DPTR
	cjne A, #03h, jump_3D2A	;   3
jump_3D24:
	clr A
	mov R7, A
	acall fwd_3D1A_jump_3B80
	sjmp jump_3D33

jump_3D2A:
	mov DPTR, #dptr_8B2C
	movx A, @DPTR
jump_3D2E:

	acall jump_3D2E
jump_3D33:
	acall jump_3D9A
jump_3D35:
	pop 0D0h
	mov 0A8h.7, C
jump_3D39:
	ret

	lcall jump_4AB1
	mov DPTR, #dptr_8B2C
	mov A, #01h	;   1
	movx @DPTR, A
	ret

	mov DPTR, #dptr_0521
	clr A
jump_3D48:
	movx @DPTR, A
	mov DPTR, #dptr_8B2C

	ret

	mov DPTR, #dptr_0521
	clr A
	movx @DPTR, A
	mov DPTR, #dptr_8B2C

	movx @DPTR, A
	ret

	mov A, R7
	jz jump_3D61
	mov DPTR, #dptr_0521
	clr A
	movx @DPTR, A
jump_3D61:
	mov DPTR, #dptr_8B2C
	mov A, #01h	;   1
	movx @DPTR, A
	ret

	mov DPTR, #dptr_8B55
jump_3D6B:
	mov A, R7
	movx @DPTR, A
	lcall jump_4FEC
	mov DPTR, #dptr_8B55
	movx A, @DPTR
	jz jump_3D7B
jump_3D76:
	mov DPTR, #dptr_0521
	clr A
	movx @DPTR, A
jump_3D7B:
	clr A
	mov DPTR, #dptr_8B2C
	movx @DPTR, A

	ret

	lcall jump_4ACB
	mov DPTR, #dptr_8B2C
	mov A, #01h	;   1
	movx @DPTR, A
	ret

	mov R7, #01h	;   1
jump_3D8D:
	lcall jump_4A7B
	clr A
	mov DPTR, #dptr_8B2C
	movx @DPTR, A
	ret

	lcall jump_4A31
	mov DPTR, #dptr_8B2C
; overlapping 2 byte(s)

org	3D9Ah
jump_3D9A:
	mov 2Dh, R3

org	3D9Eh
	movx @DPTR, A

	mov DPTR, #dptr_8B1A

	jz jump_3DFC

org	3DF5h
	clr A

org	3DF6h
	movx @DPTR, A

org	3DF7h
	anl 25h, #0FDh	; 253   -3 'ý'

org	3DFAh
	sjmp jump_3E20

jump_3DFC:
	mov DPTR, #dptr_8B0B
	movx A, @DPTR
	inc A
	movx @DPTR, A
	anl 25h, #0EFh	; 239  -17 'ï'
	mov DPTR, #dptr_8B0F
	movx A, @DPTR
	mov R7, A
	mov DPTR, #dptr_8B0B
	movx A, @DPTR
	setb C
	subb A, R7
	jc jump_3E20
	mov A, 21h
	cjne A, #01h, jump_3E20	;   1
	mov DPTR, #dptr_8B0C
	movx A, @DPTR
	jnz jump_3E20
	movx A, @DPTR
	inc A
	movx @DPTR, A
jump_3E20:
	mov DPTR, #dptr_015A
	movx A, @DPTR
	jz jump_3E36
	mov DPTR, #dptr_015A
	clr A
	movx @DPTR, A
	mov DPTR, #dptr_013B
	mov A, #04h	;   4
	movx @DPTR, A
	clr A
	mov DPTR, #dptr_8B17
	movx @DPTR, A
jump_3E36:
	mov DPTR, #dptr_015E
	movx A, @DPTR
	jz jump_3E4C
	mov DPTR, #dptr_015E
	clr A
	movx @DPTR, A
	mov DPTR, #dptr_013B
	mov A, #08h	;   8
	movx @DPTR, A
	clr A
	mov DPTR, #dptr_8B16
	movx @DPTR, A
jump_3E4C:
	ret

	clr A
	mov DPTR, #dptr_8B4E
	movx @DPTR, A
	inc DPTR
	movx @DPTR, A
jump_3E54:
	mov DPTR, #dptr_05F7
	movx A, @DPTR
	jnz jump_3E69
	inc DPTR
	movx A, @DPTR
	jnz jump_3E69
	inc DPTR
	movx A, @DPTR
	jnz jump_3E69
	inc DPTR
	movx A, @DPTR
	jnz jump_3E69
	mov R7, #01h	;   1
	ret

jump_3E69:
	setb C
	mov DPTR, #dptr_8B4F
	movx A, @DPTR
	subb A, #0E8h	; 232  -24 'è'
	mov DPTR, #dptr_8B4E
	movx A, @DPTR
	subb A, #03h	;   3
	jc jump_3E7B
	mov R7, #00h	;   0
	ret

jump_3E7B:
	mov R7, #32h	;  50 '2'
	mov R6, #00h	;   0
	lcall jump_3753
	mov DPTR, #dptr_8B4E
	clr A
	mov 0F0h, #01h	;   1
	lcall jump_4280
	sjmp jump_3E54

	mov 0Fh, R7
	clr A
	mov DPTR, #dptr_8AF2
	movx @DPTR, A
jump_3E95:
	mov A, 0Fh
	dec A
	mov R6, A
	mov DPTR, #dptr_8AF2
	movx A, @DPTR
	mov R7, A
	clr C
	subb A, R6
	jnc jump_3EB0
	mov A, R7
	inc A
	mov R5, A
	lcall jump_34B6
	mov DPTR, #dptr_8AF2
	movx A, @DPTR
	inc A
	movx @DPTR, A
	sjmp jump_3E95

jump_3EB0:
	mov A, 0Fh
	dec A
jump_3EB3:
	mov R7, A
	mov R5, #0FFh	; 255   -1 'ÿ'
	lcall jump_34B6
	mov DPTR, #dptr_8AF2
	mov A, 0Fh
	movx @DPTR, A
jump_3EBF:
	mov DPTR, #dptr_8AF2
	movx A, @DPTR
	clr C
	subb A, #0FFh	; 255   -1 'ÿ'
	jnc jump_3ED7
	movx A, @DPTR
	mov R7, A
	inc A
	mov R5, A
	lcall jump_34B6
	mov DPTR, #dptr_8AF2
	movx A, @DPTR
	inc A
	movx @DPTR, A
	sjmp jump_3EBF

jump_3ED7:
	mov R5, 0Fh
	mov R7, #0FFh	; 255   -1 'ÿ'
	ljmp jump_34B6

	djnz R4, jump_3EB3
